SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into between Alpha Services ("Provider") and Client ("Client").

1. SERVICES
Provider agrees to perform general consulting services as requested by Client.

2. PAYMENT
Client shall pay Provider $50/hour within 15 days of invoice.

3. TERM
This Agreement shall continue until terminated by either party with 7 days notice.

4. LIABILITY
Each party is responsible for its own actions.

5. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Client's location.
